start.text: Follow the path, and you'll come to the Closed AI headquarters. Be careful... It might be dangerous.
start.name: Employee

askFollow.text: Following you? You're going to need my help if you want to get through the HQ.
askFollow.name: Employee

lookFor.text: There's someone in there... He used to be like you and me, but the company got ahold of him.
lookFor.name: Employee
